DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-25-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

Appearances: Megan F. Clark of Severson & Werson (415.398.3344) for defendant Wells Fargo Bank, NA; Elaine Yang of Wedgewood, Inc. (310.640.3070 x399) appearing via Court Call for defendant Duke Partners II, LLC; Nedda Haeri of Advent Law Group (323.580.8998) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff Keyhan Mohanna.

Discussed. The Court modifies its ruling as follows: SUSTAINED with leave to amend. The complaint is uncertain. (Code Civ. Proc. 430.10, subd. (f).) Plaintiff must state in clear and unambiguous terms (1) whether Wells Fargo Bank was a proper servicer of the subject loans, (2) Plaintiff's standing regarding Unit 4 in light of the transfer of interest prior to the Trustee's sale, and (3) which causes of action are alleged against Wells Fargo Bank. Amended complaint to be filed by August 10, 2018. Order signed. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/GLW)
